Studio drag-and-drop UX overhaul and toolbar fixes

- Replace classList-based drag feedback with React-state-driven approach
- Add global isDraggingContent state coordinating sidebar and canvas
- ContentLibraryCard: grip handle, custom drag ghost, opacity/scale feedback
- ZoneBuilder: pulsing drop targets, hover glow, success flash animation
- Wire up ZoneToolbar buttons: Add Zone toggles creation mode, Grid toggle,
  Delete Zone with ConfirmDialog and API call, contextual button visibility
- Add useDeleteZone hook and update API client to accept string zone IDs
- Fix zone ID resolution: prefer numeric id, fallback to string zone_id
- Remove duplicate close button from preview modal
- Clean up unused imports and redundant canvas-level toolbar buttons

Add AI agent instructions (CLAUDE.md) and JSON data export

- Add CLAUDE.md: step-by-step instructions for AI to run weekly CTEM
  analysis — generate report, identify new vulns (last 6 days), research
  each CVE via NIST NVD / CISA KEV / EPSS / web search, score using CTEM
  framework, select top 3, save PatchPriority-YYYY-MM-DD.md to Reports/
- Add JSON export: Invoke-WeeklyVulnReport.ps1 now writes
  WeeklyVulnData-YYYYMMDD.json alongside the HTML report with all
  vulnerability fields including per-vuln OS version breakdown
- Track OS versions per vulnerability during asset scan aggregation

commit.message:
fix(drug-duration): fix 8 test regressions, add MCP search + source traceability

Fixes:
- Regex: fraction alternation order (1/2 parsed as 1), spaced fractions
- Regex: add Strategy 4.5 (N viên mỗi ngày) and Strategy 5 (uống N gói)
- Legacy calc: return None for liquid+ml without volume, mg unit mismatch
- Tests: fix mock patch target (calculator namespace), remove bad assertion
- PRN exclusion for Strategy 5 (sốt/đau/khi cần)

New features:
- MCP web-search client (Node.js multi-engine: DDG, Google, Bing)
- search_service.py: MCP primary + DDG Lite fallback with SearchResult
- Source traceability: URLs in reason field, DB source label
- Config: web_search_mcp_path, enable_search_enrichment, search_timeout

Result: 119/119 tests pass (100%)

commit.message:
feat(drug-duration): add web search enrichment for liquid drugs missing volume

When a liquid drug (chai/lọ) uses ml-based dosage but the drug name
doesn't specify package volume, the system now:
1. Tries DB identify enrichment (existing)
2. Falls back to DuckDuckGo Lite HTTP search for volume info
3. Uses LLM to analyze search snippets and extract volume
4. Retries calculation with found volume → SUCCESS_ENRICHED

Also includes: identify_enrichment service, improved LLM parsing,
weekday schedule support, volume extraction improvements, and tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- SW cache v19

commit.message:
fix: engine warmup, stale block table, async graph penalty bypass, repeat_last_n

- Add 16-token warmup at Engine::init() to prime cuBLAS autotuning,
  fixing first-request garbage output on Qwen3 models
- Fix stale block table between requests: GPUBatchPool now tracks
  first block ID alongside block count, preventing cross-request
  stale KV cache reads when block counts match
- Fix async CUDA Graph loop bypassing all penalty application:
  add penalty checks to step() and generate() graph launch guards
- Add repeat_last_n parameter (default 0 = full history) across
  the entire stack (API, server, CLI, engine, executor) to control
  penalty token window
- Remove default repetition_penalty=1.1 from server and CLI
  (matches llama.cpp/vLLM behavior)
- Add MoE fused TC kernel (gemm_moe_fused_tc.cu)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix sub-spark kirkastaminen: accepted sub-ideas become siblings, not grandchildren

When clarifying a sub-spark, accepted sub-ideas were created as children of
the sub-spark (grandchildren of the parent), making them invisible in the UI.
Now they are created as siblings (children of the same parent).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Expand verse ranges into individual verses during JSON kooste import

commit.message:
v32.1 — fix tab rename targeting + remove product images from summary

Fix dblclick rename targeting wrong tab: removed inline ondblclick
attribute (which captured stale element refs after re-render) and
replaced with addEventListener that re-queries the tab by data-pkg-id
after the click handler may have triggered a full DOM re-render.
Also use loadPricingPkgs() fresh in click handler for accurate activeId.

Remove Deako switch product images from builder summary slide footer.

commit.message:
fix(plots): use light theme grid method for dark mode visibility

Dark grid was nearly invisible (#2f3541 at 0.4 alpha on #161b26 =
~3% lightness delta). Now uses same method as light theme: 'gray'
(#808080) at 0.3 alpha, producing ~11% delta on dark backgrounds.
Background tint bleeds through at 70%, keeping grid on-palette.

map task/error types to the right implementation skill (e.g. bugs → systematic-debugging,
UI → frontend-design, RLS → security-auditor). Update skills-map delegation routes.

commit.message:
feat: '바로 길찾기' → 현재위치→음식점 네이버 길찾기 링크

- 좌표(lat/lng) 있는 음식점: 현재위치→목적지 대중교통 길찾기
  - 모바일: nmap://route.public?dlat=...&dlng=... (앱 자동 실행)
  - 앱 없을 때 폴백: 네이버 지도 웹 /directions/-/{lng},{lat},...
  - 데스크톱: 네이버 지도 웹 길찾기 새 탭
- 좌표 없는 음식점: 기존 검색 폴백 유지
